data.name: LIFT: Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control
Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control

data.description: LIFT: Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control cites Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control.
LIFT: Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control uses Soft Actor-Critic (SAC).
LIFT: Towards Bridging the Gap between Large-Scale Pretraining and Efficient Finetuning for Humanoid Control uses Newton-Euler equations.
